name: Land of the Dead
description: You have entered a vast, dim expanse where countless lost figures linger without direction. Their voices fill the space with a constant, indistinct lament, more ambient than emotional. In one corner, the remains of previous explorers have been stacked with uncomfortable efficiency. Nearby rests a beautifully carved crystal skull, polished, intact, and wearing an expression that suggests it understands the system better than you do.
